title: Meet Beau Dick: Maker of Monsters
original_title: Maker of Monsters: The Extraordinary Life of Beau Dick
overview: Meet Beau Dick gives an intimate look into the life of one of Canada's greatest artists. Beau Dick worked within an ancient tradition and rose to the ranks of international success within the white cube world of contemporary art.
